text: The total of 163 participants from 52 countries have been sponsored to attend GHG related meetings. For this session and the Intercessional Working Group's GHG20, the Trust Fund has financed the participation of delegates from 36 countries. Since MEPC 83, we have received financial contributions from Denmark, Germany, United Arab Emirates and the United Kingdom to the Voluntary Multidona Trust Fund, totaling approximately $500,000 US dollars. I would like to thank all the donors which, through their financial contributions, have facilitated and supported representative informed and evidence-based decision making. Finally, Mr Chair, as previously noted by the committee, I would also like to stress that in view of the increasing number of GHG meetings being organised, as well as the work on a number of GHG work streams, additional contributions are needed to cover further work and allow future participation at the IMO's GHG meetings. I would therefore urgently invite member states and international organisations to consider making further contributions to both funds. Thank you, Mr Chair. Thank you, Mr Osborne. I would like to express appreciation to all contributors, so the funds as well. I would also like to reiterate the invitation to member states and international organisations to consider making financial contributions to the funds in view of the increasing number of GHG related meetings being organised, as well as the work of GESAM, LCA, working group, and the forthcoming conduct of the fifth IMO GHG study. With this, we cannot turn our attention to the establishment of the working group. I would like to draw our attention to the WPE, WP2, the working group on reduction of GHG emission friendships. The requested to take into account comments and decisions made in planary. The working group is instructed to further refine the draft work plan to prepare for the entry into force of the IMO NELC Europe framework using documents, MEPC, ES23 sludge, as the basis. Also taking into account documents MEPC ES23 sludge1, MEPC ES2 sludge3 sludge3, MEPC ES235, MEPC ES2336, MEPC ES237, MEPC ES218, M2, submit a written report of planary. Bye. Tomorrow. That concludes this matter. I see the flag of the United Arab Emirates. You are here, please. Thank you, Mr. Chair. I will make this intervention in English very quick. As we have pointed out, yesterday, UAE put a proposal and as we have rightly mentioned that the proposal by the UAE will be deferred to the working group for its discussion and bring back that discussion to the their outcome to the committee on Friday. The proposal by the UAE is already uploaded in the virtual portal for consideration by the working group. Thank you, Mr. Chair. Thank you, UAE. We take note of that proposal which the working group we put on that matter to be considered on Friday. With this, this concludes our consideration of our agenda item. On this item, would not go to agenda item 4 and another business. Thank you, Mr. Chair. What's up, Mr. Chair? So, thank you very much, Chair. With regards to the previous agenda item, we just want to note for the record that the terms of reference for the working group does not prejudice the successful adoption of the revised Marple I-6. Nor does it prejudice the acceptance procedure, whether explicit or tacit, the actual acceptance or subsequent entry into force. We'd like this statement to be reflected in the report of the meeting. Thank you very much. You're still not going to be reflected in the meeting. It's not. I'd like to now advise that the group will be chair by sitting in an off-the-dome Norway and he will be supported by Sir Rue and the secretary and his team. And we'll be meeting in committee room 9. I can advise for that as mentioned during the opening session, in order to accommodate the large delegations expected to attend a group, the room has been set up with seat allocations for member seats and GUs and I-GUs and I can't let request delegations to respect the arrangements. At this time, I can ask the chair whether it means any further clarification on the terms of reference or has additional information for the group. And she also advised when he wishes that his work. It's the off-the-dough please. Thank you. Thank you chair and thank you for your summary. Just two issues for clarification. I heard you read out the terms of reference, meaning that what is in the work in paper, then we delete the square brackets around the document MEPC ES2-2-2-2-18 and include that for our consideration. So that is how you understand it. All right. So and then the other clarification is that we take on board the proposal by UAE, which they have uploaded on our virtual portal and then we take that for consideration and report back to you as appropriate. Is that clearly correct? Correct. Thank you. So when do you want to start the work please? I think we can start at 12 o'clock. So we need to get out of here and you know, meet and start a work at 12 o'clock. Sit 12 o'clock tomorrow? I wish it was. No, it's today. Thank you. All right. So the group is at 12. Yeah. Thank you. So Right, sir, please. Thank you, chair. I would just like to clarify a point. I understood you saying that the working group was supposed to start meeting tomorrow. So I would like to clarify that. Just kidding. I'll crack your joke to bring you alive. Yes. Uh, Brazil again. No, it's that please drop your okay. Yeah. We're not in our attention to our general item four or any other business. You call that no documents were submitted to the session on the base of general item. No, no, no. Unless the education wish to raise matters if any not covered as well on the agenda. I will conclude the consideration of this item. So this concludes our consideration of our general items for our meeting. We'll give time to the working group to leave the room and I'll not give a further secretary to make announcements on drafting group. Uh, good, good afternoon. Good morning, still delegates. Um, I mentioned earlier this morning, in reference to the drafting group and the report. I can advise that the report will be available as of midday today on IMO docs. Thank you. Okay. Okay. Um, we were now break and reconvened at two Saturday after launch by Honest and Philippine's has some good news for us. Philippine's can you request the floor please? Thank you, Mr. Chair. Um, it's a pleasure to invite everyone to the delegates' lounge for some Philippine food and hospitality. Thank you. Meeting as I join until two-thirds.
